positive: A minimalist geometric arrangement of stylized woodland animals—a gentle deer silhouette leaping over a group of playful raccoons, nestled among abstract foliage and stylized mushroom clusters. The scene should be rendered with a clean, bold, linework illustration style reminiscent of mid-century modern graphic design, using limited color palette of deep forest green, burnt orange, navy blue, and creamy off-white. Focus on negative space and strong, easily discernible silhouettes. Centered composition suitable for large-scale apparel print. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
